generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AnemometerDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance AnemometerDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance TimescaleDBTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of crane state variables stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, AnemometerDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Trinamic TMC4671-Eval motor controller for cart movement"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Trinamic TMC4671-Eval motor controller for hoist movement"
]

instance StepperMotorCart : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for cart movement"
]

instance StepperMotorHoist : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for hoist movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container pickup"
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker for containerization"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeDataVisualizationService, CraneSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database for time-series data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana for data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for inter-service signaling"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeDataVisualizationService, CraneSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance GantryLibEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module for crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, CraneSimulationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance ArduinoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino for sensor data acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance AutodeskFusion360Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion 360 for CAD modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, CraneSimulationService
]

instance C4ModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C4 Model for system architecture"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeDataVisualizationService, CraneSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance CapellaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Capella for Model-Based Systems Engineering"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeDataVisualizationService, CraneSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of the gantry crane created with Autodesk Fusion 360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutodeskFusion360Enabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation of the crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLibEnabler
]

instance ArcadiaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Capella Arcadia model for Model-Based Systems Engineering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CapellaEnabler
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation based on kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logging of historical crane state data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides LogHistoricalDataAction
]

instance RealTimeDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization using Grafana"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance CraneSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of crane movements"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulateCraneAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation by comparing real-time measurements with simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlertInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection using time series classification techniques"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultLocalizationInsight
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generate optimal trajectory using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LogHistoricalDataAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Log historical data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SimulateCraneAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Simulate crane movements"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ValidationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous validation alerts for threshold breaches"
]

instance FaultLocalizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault localization via time series classification"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of trajectory traces and confidence bounds in Grafana dashboard"
]

instance PhysicalGantryCrane : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical lab-scale gantry crane system for moving pucks between locations, inspired by harbor cranes in the port of Antwerp"
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartMotorController, HoistMotorController, StepperMotorCart, StepperMotorHoist, Electromagnet
]

instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized digital twin system for the gantry crane"
    base:contains TimescaleDBTimeSeriesData, CADModel, KinematicModel, ArcadiaModel, DockerEnabler, TimescaleDBEnabler, GrafanaEnabler, EclipseMosquittoEnabler, GantryLibEnabler, ArduinoEnabler, AutodeskFusion360Enabler, C4ModelEnabler, CapellaEnabler, OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeDataVisualizationService, CraneSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., optimal trajectories from Trajectory Generator Service) sent via Control Application to physical crane's motor controllers for movement execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization with no specified time intervals; data logged and validated continuously during operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Physical crane components (frame, motors, controllers, sensors) interfaced via Python; digital twin services (database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation, validation) interconnected via MQTT and TimescaleDB; operator and researcher interact through Human Machine Interface."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase ('as operated') with continuous validation and fault detection during crane operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service calculates distance metrics between real measurements and simulated trajectories; thresholds trigger operator notifications; model validation techniques reused from [5]."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication; TimescaleDB for time-series data storage; Python-based interfaces for physical control."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Docker containerized components (database, MQTT broker, dashboard) deployed on a personal computer via docker-compose; gantrylib Python module installed via pip."
]
